name: block/console-app
description: Carbon-parity console shell: ShellHeader + icon-rail SideNav + HeaderPanel notifications/switcher + collapsible aside + main content.

meta.name: ConsoleApp
meta.description: Carbon-parity console shell: ShellHeader + icon-rail SideNav + HeaderPanel notifications/switcher + collapsible aside + main content.

whenToUse: A Carbon-parity console shell with icon-rail nav, header panels, and aside
Admin or operations consoles needing dense, app-like navigation
whenNotToUse: A simpler sidebar app — use SidebarApp
A bare shell to fully customise — use AppShell

related.name: SidebarApp
related.reason: Use for a lighter, less dense sidebar app frame

related.name: AppShell
related.reason: Use the bare shell to compose custom console chrome

intent.a11yRationale: Provides header, navigation, and complementary landmarks for screen reader orientation.
